logros.title: Architecture that holds up in production
logros.desc: Platforms used by public agencies, financial institutions and private companies. From requirements analysis to production deployment and support of critical systems.
logros.card1.label: Sustained Uptime
logros.card1.desc: I led the design of the company's electronic signature suite, SaaS platforms in production for clients in the Chilean financial and government sectors.
logros.card2.label: Transactions / hour
logros.card2.desc: Architecture designed to support high operational concurrency, with observability implemented via Grafana and Prometheus.
logros.card3.label: People Led
logros.card3.desc: Leading development teams focused on technical mentoring, structured onboarding and reduced talent turnover.
logros.card4.label: Years in Production
logros.card4.desc: Full cycle: architecture design, development, operations and continuous evolution of critical systems in highly regulated environments.
logros.note: Numbers correspond to architecture and performance metrics of platforms I designed and operated in production.
saas.title: Leadership in Critical Product Development
saas.desc: I have led the full lifecycle of high-security solutions, from technical conception to large-scale operations, transforming complex requirements into robust architectures.
projects.title: Open Source & Projects
projects.desc: Open source solutions from my public repository that reflect my ability to take ideas to production, from PWAs to cloud infrastructure.
